articles.title: Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' including reopening Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.

articles.title: France suspends extra EU border checks at Dover after hours-long queues
articles.description: The port said extra checks would be suspended, after travellers faced queues as temperatures soared.

articles.title: 'Shameful' more spent on benefits than jobs for young people, says Milburn
articles.description: Reforms are needed of the welfare system to tackle the high numbers of young people not in work or education, says Alan Milburn.
